description: Style Note Offering superior cushioning and flexibility in a sporty design, the nike Max Turbulence+ 17 is ideal for neutral runners. With top notch cushioning and a visible Air Max heel, it's a great shoe for both the trail and for casual wear. What's even better is that this shoe is Nike+ compatible, allowing you to use Nike+ products to clock your runs and calories in style. Product Details Mesh upper for maximum breathability with targeted overlays for added support where you need it most Perforated midfoot overlays for added shoe structure and ventilation and a lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, breathable comfort and synthetic swoosh overlays on the sides for added shoe support and style Full length Cushlon foam midsole for maximum cushioning and all-day comfort with a visible Air Max unit in the heel for ultimate impact protection during heel-strike Fitsole footbed for padded all-day comfort, customised fit and enhanced support to the foot Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Durable, environmentally preferred rubber outsole in waffle pattern for maximum traction and grip on all terrain Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistance Flex grooves in the forefoot for flexible foot movement and for a smooth ride Impact guidance system for better energy return and impact protection Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
